description: Classify populated places in the shapefile located at /home/ga/gvsig_data/cities/ne_110m_populated_places.shp using gvSIG Desktop. Add a new string field named 'URBAN_CAT' (length 20) to the layer's attribute table. Populate the 'URBAN_CAT' field such that features with a 'POP_MAX' value of 10,000,000 or greater are assigned the value 'Megacity', and all other features are assigned the value 'City'. Save the changes to the shapefile.
